name: Praveen Kumar
message: Congratulations on your beautiful wedding. May your union be filled with lasting love and harmonious companionship.

name: Kumar
message: Congratulations on officially tying the knot. May your life be full of love, laughter, and many, many date nights.

name: Kuberan
message: Wishing you a lifetime of love, laughter, and endless adventures together. Congratulations!

name: Ramesh & Family
message: Wishing Ajith and Rishivindhiya a lifetime of love, happiness, and prosperity together! Looking forward to the Mugurtham.

name: Shruti Sen
message: Congratulations Rishi! You make such a stunning bride. So happy for you and Ajith. Wishing you the absolute best chapter ahead!

name: Karthik Raja
message: Double coding power now! Congratulations Ajith bro, and welcome Rishivindhiya. Happy married life to you both!
